min_genes.ui:help: Hard minimum genes per cell before MAD filtering.

min_counts.ui:help: Hard minimum UMI counts per cell before MAD filtering.

n_mads.ui:help: Number of MADs used to detect outliers for counts, genes, and MT%.

mt_cutoff.ui:help: Optional absolute mitochondrial percentage cutoff. Leave empty to use MAD-based cutoff.

expected_doublet_rate.ui:help: Expected doublet rate passed to Scrublet.

skip_doublets.ui:help: Skip Scrublet doublet detection and doublet removal.

form.title: H5AD Single-Cell QC Preprocessing
form.description: Scan all h5ad files in the input dataset, run QC preprocessing per file, and emit per-file outputs.

min_genes.title: Minimum Genes
min_genes.description: Hard minimum genes detected per cell

min_counts.title: Minimum Counts
min_counts.description: Hard minimum UMI counts per cell

mt_cutoff.title: Mitochondrial Percent Cutoff (Optional)
mt_cutoff.description: Absolute MT% cutoff. Leave empty to use MAD-based MT% threshold.

expected_doublet_rate.title: Expected Doublet Rate
expected_doublet_rate.description: Expected doublet rate used by Scrublet

skip_doublets.title: Skip Doublet Detection
skip_doublets.description: If selected, skip Scrublet scoring and doublet removal
